title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
